action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves global environmental factors including the market condition index and geographic context (zoning, flood zones, etc.).

action_set_definitions.name: get_property_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves technical and financial details for a specific property ID, including FMV, floor area, and building materials.

property_id.description: The unique identifier for the property.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_air_rights_loss
action_set_definitions.description: Quantifies the financial value of the development rights (air rights) being extinguished based on zoning and current density.

action_set_definitions.name: estimate_maintenance_premium
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the increased operational expenditure (OpEx) required to maintain the facade according to SOI Standards versus standard commercial maintenance.

action_set_definitions.name: compute_easement_valuation
action_set_definitions.description: Synthesizes all factors to determine the total Easement Value and the Easement Diminution Percentage (EDP).

cap_rate_adjustment.description: Basis point increase due to restricted utility/liquidity.

action_set_definitions.name: log_valuation_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the internal valuation log to ensure cross-reference consistency and auditability for IRS Form 8283.

state_description.target_property_id: Unique identifier for the primary property being appraised.
state_description.market_condition_index: A multiplier representing local market heat (1.0 is stable, >1.0 is a seller's market).
state_description.internal_valuation_log: A hidden list of all data points accessed to ensure cross-reference consistency.
state_description.geographic_context: Fixed environmental factors like zoning, school district ratings, and flood zone status.
